name: Protein Dialysis Buffer (Generic)
nameCn: 蛋白透析缓冲液（通用型）

notes.en: Use ≥200× volume excess relative to sample. Change dialysis buffer 2–3 times (2 h each at 4°C, or overnight for last change). MWCO: 3.5 kDa for <20 kDa proteins, 12–14 kDa for larger. Add 10% glycerol for long-term storage after dialysis.
notes.zh: 透析液体积需 ≥200 倍样品体积。更换 2–3 次（每次 4°C 2 h，最后一次可过夜）。截留分子量：<20 kDa 蛋白用 3.5 kDa MWCO，大蛋白用 12–14 kDa MWCO。透析后加 10% 甘油可延长储存期。

ref: Scopes (1994) Protein Purification, 3rd ed., Springer; Wingfield (2001) Curr Protoc Protein Sci A.3B.1

storage.notes: Prepare fresh; add DTT just before use

usage.en: General dialysis buffer for buffer exchange to remove imidazole, salt, or small molecules.
usage.zh: 通用透析缓冲液，用于换液去除咪唑、盐分等小分子。

prepSteps.step: Dissolve Tris-HCl, NaCl, and optional additives (glycerol, DTT, EDTA) in ~1500 mL ddH₂O.
Bring to final volume of 2000 mL.
Degas if needed by stirring under vacuum.
Store at 4°C; prepare fresh DTT on day of use.
